headline: Why Advanced Micro Devices Could Be the Next $1 Trillion Stock
summary: Nvidia  CEO Jensen Huang recently said  Marvell Technology  could become the next trillion-dollar stock.  Well, it looks like  Advanced Micro Devices  ’ investors would like a word on that.  AMD shares advanced 3.1% to $537.57 on Wednesday, trading as high as $544.04 intraday and on pace for a record closing high, as investors shook off their  Nvidia  announcement hangover and broadly pushed red-hot chip stocks higher.

content.title: Why Advanced Micro Devices Could Be the Next $1 Trillion Stock
content.summary: Nvidia  CEO Jensen Huang recently said  Marvell Technology  could become the next trillion-dollar stock.  Well, it looks like  Advanced Micro Devices  ’ investors would like a word on that.  AMD shares advanced 3.1% to $537.57 on Wednesday, trading as high as $544.04 intraday and on pace for a record closing high, as investors shook off their  Nvidia  announcement hangover and broadly pushed red-hot chip stocks higher.
